results.title: PM departs for Asean-Russia Commemorative Summit in Kazan
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim departed from the Subang Air Base on Tuesday (June 16) for Kazan, Russia, to attend the Asean-Russia Commemorative Summit.
